chapter_title.ar: باب صَلَاةِ الْمَلَّاحِينَ وَ الْمُكَارِينَ وَ أَصْحَابِ الصَّيْدِ وَ الرَّجُلِ يَخْرُجُ إِلَى ضَيْعَتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 80 – The sailors, and the Hirers, and the hunters, and the man who goes out to his estate

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/387)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مرسل - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (15/387)
text: الْأَعْرَابُ لَا يُقَصِّرُونَ وَ ذَلِكَ أَنَّ مَنَازِلَهُمْ مَعَهُمْ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from his father, from Suleyman Bin Ja’far Al Ja’fary, from the one who mentioned it,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The Bedouins would not be shortening, and that is because their houses are with them (like the nomads and the gypsies etc.)’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from ibn Khalid from his father from Sulayman ibn Ja‘far al- Ja‘fariy from those whom he has mentioned who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘Arabs (desert dwellers) do not perform their Salah (prayer) as reduced because their homes are with them.’”
